snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 ‚Äî How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 ‚Äî DIY ring 

2:48 ‚Äî Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 ‚Äî DIY hair comb 

6:53 ‚Äî Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 ‚Äî DIY fake nails

snippet.title: Ang encounter ni Carmina Villarroel sa walang-respetong aktres at kay Julia Montes
snippet.description:
Bago matapos ang kanyang PEP Live interview, sumabak sa bagong "PEP Challenge" na "Spill The 'T'" si Carmina Villarroel.

Binigyan ng mga tanong si Carmina na kailangan niyang sabihin ang totoo.

Isa sa mga tanong ay kung nagkaroon na ba ng pagkakataon na may kinumpronta siyang young actor o actress dahil sa pag-a-attitude.

Binalikan ng 45-year-old Kapuso actress ang encounter niya sa isang young actress na pinagsabihan niya dahil sa hindi magandang trato nito sa sariling ina nito.

Pagkatapos ay nagkuwento pa si Carmina ng kanyang encounter sa isa namang disrespectful young actress.

Hindi niya tuloy mapigilan na ikumpara ang batang aktres na ito sa isa pang young actress noon na hindi pa niya nakikilala pero nilapitan siya't bumati sa kanya, si Julia Montes.

Panoorin ang video para sa detalye ng kuwentong ito ni Carmina.

Para sa related article, i-click ang link na ito: http://bit.ly/CarminaJuliaMontes

Para naman sa full PEP Live interview ni Carmina, i-click ito: http://bit.ly/CarminaPEPLive

#CarminaVillarroel? #BabawiinKoAngLahat? #PEPlive?

Livestream Producer: Rommel R. Llanes

snippet.title: COBRA GIRL 2021 - New Hollywood Hindi Dubbed Action Movie | #Latest Released Hindi Dubbed Movie 2021
snippet.description:
Summaries:
Chanachol, recently returned to Thailand after living overseas, signs up for a tour to get back in touch with Thai culture, and finds himself attracted to the tour guide, Mekhala. There are several problems with the relationship: Chanachol is married, with family, and Mekhala has a mysterious, symbiotic relationship with a deadly cobra, and many of her previous suitors have ended up dead.
Director: M.L. Pundhevanop Dhewakul
Stars: Shahkrit Yamnarm, Karnpitchar Ketmanee, Jiravich Pongpaijit

ABOUT CG5
--------------------
CG5 is a music producer creating original songs, and remixing songs from television shows, video games, and more! Subscribe for music all the time! 

Logo Intro by Eastah ‚ñ∂  https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1VzCDhg2XgtQbO9XwPcqIQ

Facebook ‚ñ∂ https://www.facebook.com/cg5beats
Instagram ‚ñ∂ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

LYRICS:

I‚Äôm waking up,
breathing in clean air,
What a day, yeah,
What a sunny, funny day.
I feel so high, I can‚Äôt deny
A little better than okay,
Nowhere to go.
I shoot for stars, I‚Äôm Galileo.
Pack your bags and don‚Äôt be late.
The scenery flies before my eyes,
Don‚Äôt you dream of home, cuz it‚Äôll have to wait.

It‚Äôs good to be alive,
It‚Äôs good to be alive,
I‚Äôm happy to survive,
So good.

Can‚Äôt kill my la-di-da vibe,
Suffocate my feelin‚Äô alright,
Or asphyxiate my hype.
My bridges burned, no stone unturned.
It‚Äôs a relations‚Äô massacre.
My new absolution,
My new lease on life has just begun today.
I ain‚Äôt worried ‚Äòbout the fakes, or the bodies in my wake.
Baby, I‚Äôm a firework, like Pompeii.

It‚Äôs good to be alive,
It‚Äôs good to be alive,
I‚Äôm happy to survive,
So, so good.

The saints and angels sing,
Choir of the bells chime, ring ring ring.
I feel alive, 
So alive!

It‚Äôs good to be alive,
It‚Äôs good to be alive,
I‚Äôm happy to survive,
So, so good.

It's good!
So good!
It's good!
So good!

This show is dedicated to Filipinos all around the world! May these songs and stories bring you hope, help you heal, and send you love.

Hosted by VJ Ai Dela Cruz and Edward Barber

snippet.title: WARRIORS at MAVERICKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 6, 2021
snippet.description:
WARRIORS at MAVERICKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 6, 2021

Luka Doncic (career-high tying 42 PTS, 7 REB, 11 AST) and Stephen Curry (57 PTS, 11 3pt FGM) went head-to-head in Dallas as the Dallas Mavericks defeated the Golden State Warriors, 134-132, splitting their two-game back-to-back series. Additionally for the Warriors, Draymond Green tallied 2 PTS, 6 REB, 15 AST, 6 STL and 4 BLK.

snippet.title: Thurman vs Porter FULL FIGHT: June 25, 2016 - PBC on Showtime
snippet.description:
Prizefighting returned to CBS on Saturday, June 25, 2016, with a Fight of the Year candidate as undefeated welterweight world champion Keith Thurman edged former world champion Shawn Porter in a close but unanimous decision scored 115-113 by all three ringside judges.

The 12,718 fans in attendance at Barclays Center in Brooklyn and the viewers across the U.S. watching the first primetime boxing event on CBS since Muhammed Ali-Leon Spinks in 1978 were treated to a slugfest between two of the brightest stars in boxing‚Äôs glamour division. 

Thurman (27-0, 22 KOs) and Porter (26-2-1, 16 KOs) combined to throw over 1200 punches in the SHOWTIME CHAMPIONSHIP BOXING on CBS event, presented by Premier Boxing Champions.  The marquee showdown was a story of accuracy vs. activity, as Thurman landed 50 percent of his power shots, compared to 38 percent for Porter, and 44 percent of his total punches compared to just 36 percent for the challenger.  While Thurman landed at a higher percentage, Porter was the busier fighter, throwing over 100 more punches across 12 rounds. 

‚ÄúOne Time‚Äù and ‚ÄúShowtime‚Äù delivered as advertised, with the powerful sharpshooter buckling Porter multiple times, while the swarming and smothering Porter barreled forward to bully Thurman into the ropes.  And while there were no knockdowns, the back-and-forth blockbuster never lacked action and culminated in a standing ovation in the second-highest attended boxing event in Barclays Center history.

"I want to thank Shawn Porter for a tremendous fight.  He's a great warrior,‚Äù said Thurman.  ‚ÄúDefense is the key to victory.  He smothers his punches a lot and makes it difficult for the judges to score.  I was able to rock him with clear, effective blows and I believe that was the difference today.

‚ÄúI would give him a rematch. It was great fight.  He was a great opponent.  Everyone was saying would he be my toughest opponent to date.  I wasn‚Äôt able to drop him but I did buckle him a few times.‚Äù

The former world champion Porter, a perennial underdog but consummate gentleman, didn‚Äôt complain about being on the losing end of his second close decision in a title bout.  

‚ÄúWe worked hard, Keith is a great champion,‚Äù Porter said. ‚ÄúMy dad says to keep your head up.  I think I won the fight, but I'm satisfied because the competitor came out tonight.

"We need that rematch.  I know the fans want that rematch.  If he gives me another chance, I'm going to work hard in the ring and leave with his title."

#ThurmanvsPorter #ShawnPorter #KeithThurman

Visit PremierBoxingChampions.com for info.

SIGN UP FOR FIGHT ALERTS: 

http://pbcham.ps/FightAlerts

FOLLOW US:

https://twitter.com/premierboxing
https://instagram.com/premierboxing
https://www.facebook.com/premierboxingchampions

The former world champion Porter, a perennial underdog but consummate gentleman, didn‚Äôt complain about being on the losing end of his second close decision in a title bout.  

‚ÄúWe worked hard, Keith is a great champion,‚Äù Porter said. ‚ÄúMy dad says to keep your head up.  I think I won the fight, but I'm satisfied because the competitor came out tonight.

"We need that rematch.  I know the fans want that rematch.  If he gives me another chance, I'm going to work hard in the ring and leave with his title."

#ThurmanvsPorter #ShawnPorter #KeithThurman

en.title: Thurman vs Porter FULL FIGHT: June 25, 2016 - PBC on Showtime
en.description:
Prizefighting returned to CBS on Saturday, June 25, 2016, with a Fight of the Year candidate as undefeated welterweight world champion Keith Thurman edged former world champion Shawn Porter in a close but unanimous decision scored 115-113 by all three ringside judges.

The 12,718 fans in attendance at Barclays Center in Brooklyn and the viewers across the U.S. watching the first primetime boxing event on CBS since Muhammed Ali-Leon Spinks in 1978 were treated to a slugfest between two of the brightest stars in boxing‚Äôs glamour division. 

Thurman (27-0, 22 KOs) and Porter (26-2-1, 16 KOs) combined to throw over 1200 punches in the SHOWTIME CHAMPIONSHIP BOXING on CBS event, presented by Premier Boxing Champions.  The marquee showdown was a story of accuracy vs. activity, as Thurman landed 50 percent of his power shots, compared to 38 percent for Porter, and 44 percent of his total punches compared to just 36 percent for the challenger.  While Thurman landed at a higher percentage, Porter was the busier fighter, throwing over 100 more punches across 12 rounds. 

‚ÄúOne Time‚Äù and ‚ÄúShowtime‚Äù delivered as advertised, with the powerful sharpshooter buckling Porter multiple times, while the swarming and smothering Porter barreled forward to bully Thurman into the ropes.  And while there were no knockdowns, the back-and-forth blockbuster never lacked action and culminated in a standing ovation in the second-highest attended boxing event in Barclays Center history.

"I want to thank Shawn Porter for a tremendous fight.  He's a great warrior,‚Äù said Thurman.  ‚ÄúDefense is the key to victory.  He smothers his punches a lot and makes it difficult for the judges to score.  I was able to rock him with clear, effective blows and I believe that was the difference today.

‚ÄúI would give him a rematch. It was great fight.  He was a great opponent.  Everyone was saying would he be my toughest opponent to date.  I wasn‚Äôt able to drop him but I did buckle him a few times.‚Äù

The former world champion Porter, a perennial underdog but consummate gentleman, didn‚Äôt complain about being on the losing end of his second close decision in a title bout.  

‚ÄúWe worked hard, Keith is a great champion,‚Äù Porter said. ‚ÄúMy dad says to keep your head up.  I think I won the fight, but I'm satisfied because the competitor came out tonight.

"We need that rematch.  I know the fans want that rematch.  If he gives me another chance, I'm going to work hard in the ring and leave with his title."

#ThurmanvsPorter #ShawnPorter #KeithThurman

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚Äî and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

snippet.title: PISTONS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 6, 2021
snippet.description:
PISTONS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 6, 2021

The Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Detroit Pistons, 135-129, in double-overtime. LeBron James (33 PTS, 5 REB, 11 AST) and Anthony Davis (30 PTS, 5 REB, 3 AST) combined for 63 PTS for the Lakers in the victory, while Jerami Grant tallied 32 PTS, 4 REB and 6 AST for the Pistons.

Next Games:

snippet.title: PART 2 | NAWAWALANG SEAMAN, IPINA-PSYCHIC NG UTOL NIYA.
snippet.description:
Part 1: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GrZbGB0t_kQ

MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: PART 2 | ANG LOVE STORY NG ISANG SURGEON AT KANYANG KOLEHIYALANG GF.
snippet.description:
Part 1: https://youtu.be/J73zjzSU8WY

MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: NUGGETS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 4, 2021
snippet.description:
NUGGETS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 4, 2021

LeBron James put up a huge triple-double with 27 PTS, 10 REB and 10 AST as the Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Denver Nuggets, 114-93. Dennis Schroder netted 21 PTS and 4 AST, Talen Horton-Tucker provided 17 PTS and Anthony Davis finished with 13 PTS, 9 REB, 3 STL and 2 BLK in the win. Jamal Murray led the Nuggets with 20 PTS and 5 AST, and Nikola Jokic finished with 13 PTS, 10 REB and 6 AST.

Next Games:
Denver Nuggets at Sacramento Kings ‚Äì Feb. 6 at 5pm/et on NBATV
Detroit Pistons at Los Angeles Lakers ‚Äì Feb. 6 at 10pm/et on NBA League Pass

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ‚Äì Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬Ý
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong,‚Äù the next epic adventure in Legendary‚Äôs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong‚Äù as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans‚Äîinstigated by unseen forces‚Äîis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚Äù ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚Äù), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚Äù), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚Äù ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚Äù), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚Äù ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚Äù), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚Äù), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚Äù), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚Äù), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚Äù) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚Äù ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚Äù).
Wingard (‚ÄúThe Guest,‚Äù ‚ÄúYou‚Äôre Next‚Äù) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (‚ÄúThor: Ragnarok‚Äù) and Max Borenstein (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚Äù ‚ÄúKong: Skull Island‚Äù), story by Terry Rossio (‚ÄúPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales‚Äù) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚Äù), based on the character ‚ÄúGodzilla‚Äù owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (‚ÄúThe Mummy,‚Äù ‚ÄúWorld War Z‚Äù), production designers Owen Paterson (‚ÄúJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,‚Äù ‚ÄúGodzilla‚Äù) and Thomas S. Hammock (‚ÄúBlair Witch‚Äù), editor Josh Schaeffer (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚Äù), costume designer Ann Foley (‚ÄúSkyscraper‚Äù) and visual effects supervisor John ‚ÄúDJ‚Äù DesJardin (upcoming ‚ÄúZack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League‚Äù).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong.‚Äù  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

Cosmopolitan managed to fit S.coups, Wonwoo, Mingyu, Vernon, Woozi, Jeonghan, Joshua, DK, Seungkwan, Hoshi, Jun, The 8, AND Dino in one episode of TTCC and they CRUSHED it! These boys know how to dance. 

Who was your fave? üëá

‚ú®COSMO SHOWS‚ú®
Singing in the Shower https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-HPx_vXw82k&list=PLrx4fxhgMUOaO_usvNBYa5jwWY2PfGl7S üõÅ

Drip or Drop! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9P-io6o5JgE&list=PLrx4fxhgMUOYO3KJArDPPOdW74yC0JuwX üíß
That Feeling When https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZO2TYoRQxp8&list=PLrx4fxhgMUOaiE2gNXMFnEbwJRjxhYSJS üî•
Stir Crazy https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I2vYWew7CMY&list=PLrx4fxhgMUObfjgOcMzv0fSpIQWQdMEH1 üç∏
Through My Queue! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6HxJhd3xsoU&list=PLrx4fxhgMUOaLtLfgwq6QmXcn-QIBCRZB üì∫

snippet.title: Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho:  Tatlong mangingisda sa Antique, 20 araw na nagpalutang-lutang sa laot
snippet.description:
Aired (January 31, 2021): Tatlong mangingisda mula Antique, 20 araw na nagpalutang-lutang sa laot bago na-rescue sa Tawi-Tawi! Panoorin ang buong kuwento.

'Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho' is GMA Network's highest-rating magazine show. Hosted by the country's most awarded broadcast journalist Jessica Soho, it features stories on food, urban legends, trends, and pop culture. 'KMJS' airs every Sunday, 8:25 PM on GMA Network.

Subscribe to youtube.com/gmapublicaffairs for our full episodes. #KMJS

snippet.title: Wowowin: President Duterte at GMA Network heads, naghatid ng mensahe kay Willie Revillame
snippet.description:
Aired (January 27, 2021): Bukod sa ilang artistang nakasama ni Kuya Wil sa industriya, may espesyal na birthday greetings din ang GMA Network heads at si Pangulong Rodrigo Duterte para sa kanya!

Catch the latest episodes of 'Wowowin' weekdays at 5 PM on GMA Network, hosted by Willie Revillame.#Wowowin #TutokToWinsaWowowin

 

To our #KapusoAbroad, you can watch the latest episodes on GMA Pinoy TV! For more information, visit gmapinoytv.com/subscribe.
________________
Watch the latest highlights of Wowowin #WithMe! Stay #AtHome and subscribe to Wowowin's official YouTube channel and click the bell button to catch the latest videos.

snippet.title: Military takes power in Myanmar, Aung San Suu Kyi detained
snippet.description:
Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi and other senior figures from the ruling party have been detained in an early morning raid. 
The military declares a state of emergency following days of escalating tension between the civilian government and the powerful military, which claims the November election was tainted by fraud. 
 
Al Jazeera‚Äôs Victoria Gatenby reports.

Pencilmate's on the case! Can he find the culprit who took Granny's glasses?!

Pencilmate's LAUNCHING into space to save the planet Earth! 

9:43 - GOOD GOLDFISH
Can Pencilmate's GENIUS goldfish help Pencilmate become SUPER COOL?!

Pencilmate can't seem to watch the movie in peace! Will the theater calm down?!

Pencilmate finds a magical lamp and gets to make ONE wish... will it really come true??

24:17 - THINGS THAT GO BUMP IN THE NIGHT
Pencilmate tries his best to fall asleep but can't!! What's keeping him awake?!

26:37 - NO BUS NO FUSS
Can Pencilmate catch Pencilmiss before she catches the bus?

28:50 - DARK SIDE OF THE BALLOON
Pencilmate discovers the joy (and the headache) of helium.

Follow the new, wacky, and often times quite silly adventures of Pencilmate, Little Blue Man, Pencilmiss and other toons every Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday and Sunday.

3:12 - WHOSE LINE UP IS IT ANYWAY

26:37 - NO BUS NO FUSS

Godzilla vs Kong, coming to HBO Max on March 31, is the followup to Godzilla King of the Monsters (2019), Kong Skull Island (2017), and Godzilla (2014). Why is King Kong fighting Godzilla now, and what is the deeper threat that they might join forces to fight? Is MECHA-GODZILLA hiding in plain sight in this trailer? Erik Voss breaks down everything you need to know about this Godzilla Kong movie, and every detail that you might have overlooked in this trailer. What is the secret connection between Kong and the girl, Jia? What conspiracy are the organizations Apex and Monarch hiding after the events of Godzilla King of the Monsters? What VFX details make the Godzilla vs Kong fight scenes so much fun to watch?

snippet.description:

Lyrics video for "PAJAMA PARTY" by 1096 Gang.

"1096 alam mo na kapag naririnig mo 'to, 
Nasa kabilang banda kami ng hinahanap mo
Pamparam pam pam pamparaparam pam, 
Sumabay lang sa bayo sarap sa pakiramdaman
Pamparam pam pam pamparaparam pam"

PAJAMA PARTY - 1096 Gang // tiktok song

Official Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l7uB0DG2jMA
Subscribe to 1096 Gang: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCadSpxMdMlAZPeLxqiGPJZg

üé§ Lyrics: PAJAMA PARTY - 1096 Gang

[Verse 1: Guddhist]
Pagpasok ng tunog tenga ko nilabasan
Goodshit si Gecko halatang nasarapan
Tapos tignan mo si Dan fasting parang Ramadan
Damo 'yan pare 'di na 'ko n'yan tinatalaban
Ginagawa ko lang yung mga gusto nila na gawin
'Di ako pasaway kaya 'wag n'yo 'ko sawayin
Subukan mong tanungin yung mga nasa likod
Kung pamilyar ba sila sa pangalang kuya Gudd
Kuya Gudd, pwede ba ako sa 'yo rumekta?
Sabi nung kaibigan ng kaibigan ko na hustla
Hindi 'to basta-basta mahirap maabot
Mahirap makakolabo sa pera si kuya Gudd
Ayokong sapilitan gusto ko yung natural
'Pag ako nakulitan gusto ko nang manakal
Biro lang pero walang sini-sino aming gang
1096 Mandaluyong bayan ng mga buang
Polo Pi pakisabihan nga si tropang Luci
J i-roll mo na 'yan na agayat na broccoli
Basic parang ollie iprito mo na 'yan
Paborito na chubibo sa hapag ng kainan lumpia

[Verse 2: Youngwise]
Dami na ngang umaangal sobrang ingay na daw natin
Yung kalabog ng tugtug ni hindi nga daw sa 'tin
Aayusin nalang natin 'gat hindi pa alanganin
Ang gaan na sa loob bigat pa ng pasanin
Nakarolyo pa bagain paikot sabay sa hangin
Sirkulo layo sa oblo malaya sa hangarin
Ang dating parang praning kakaumaling
Pagkita pagtingin sa malagkit na tanim
Goodstop nasa woods na mala-woodstack
Nakasabit lang sa hammock at padukat-dukat
Naka-acid isang blott at kurastobakot plant
Pero lahat ng 'yun joke lang kaya nga it's a prank

Ang baduy kung kayo lang 'wag na uyy
Sa mainit na kahoy usok nilalanguy
Wala ng panaghuy tila walang ka-uri
Bago magturo linisin muna ang daliri
Para 'di nga magsisi 'wag basta mawiwili
Gagagalingan mo nalang sa desisyong pinipili
'Wag mawala sa sarili ang tatandaan
Dadaanan mo lang 'yan 'wag mo tambayan, ano ba 'yan?

[Verse 3: Polo Pi]
Sakto sakit ng ulo wala naman masyadong ginawa tambay lang sa kanto
Kaya naman nandito napasama pa 'ko sa mga talentadong tao pero gago
'Wag ka lang masyado inaaning mo na 'ko
Tagay na yung fruit juice hawak ko sa baso
Malunggay nasa apip pakiabot nga dito
Sa panahon ngayon puro tangkay nalang yung piso
Asim walang ligo live ka pa sa Bigo
Dami mong sinulat walang labas na bago
Sa sobra kong payat hinahabol na 'ko ng aso
Ingat sa pag-abot baka ako d'yan ay mapaso
Kaso lalo pa akong ginaganahan
Talento ko ngayon ay akin pang pinagkitaan
Wais lang kase kapag puso ang pinairal
Dapat balanse ka sa tinatahak na daanan
Dami ng makitid, ano ba 'yan?

[Verse 4: Ghetto Gecko]
Kita mo lumalaganap enerhiya ko sa game yeah
Bagong katauhan, bagong roll, at bagong name yeah
Dati kong sariling 'di mahanap 'di ma-trace
Nahagilap ko sa ulap at in-e-enjoy yung taste hmm
Nasa lugar na 'di makikita sa Waze
Nag-be-blaze na 'di pangkaraniwang face
Naka-face mask on just in case yeah
Bawal magkakaso kase meron pa 'kong case yeah
Lumilipad parang si Aladdin
Nakaupo inaasar sila inaaning
Takot sila kapag merong biglang bumabahing
'Di makalabas kase kulong parin sa quarantin–µ hmm
Nasa'n na ba 'ko kakagising ko lang
Pagkagising ko yung stash ko nagkulang-kulang
Dito ko 'yun nilagay ah ipinatong ko lang
Sasamahan pa kita pre kung sinabi mo lang
At sa ilalim sinag ng bilog na buwan
Naglalaro kami habang natutulog ka lang
Pakiramdam ko ay parang nalulunod sa dam
Mahiyain kaya 'wag mo sa 'kin tutok yung cam

[Verse 5: Luci J]
May pagpupulong nanaman bagong papakinggan
Eto at nag-aayos ako ng kagamitan
Tapos punta kila Gudd 'onting lakad lang naman
Nakasabay pa si Polo sa 'king nadaanan
Mamaya-maya n'yan lalabas na ang kulet
Mamaga-maga pa mata ko na kay singket
Nilalaro lang namin yung hadlang kung makul–µt
Tanong mo sa bumilib at kung sinong malupet
1096 siksikan ang sustansya ang dala
Parang luto lang ni Gudds sentient food
1096 alam mo na kapag naririnig mo 'to
Nasa kabilang banda kami ng hinahanap mo
Pamparam pam pam pamparaparam pam
Sumabay lang sa bayo sarap sa pakiramdaman
Pamparam pam pam pamparaparam pam
Nagawa namin ito habang bilog din ang buwan, mga buang!
